audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass offers 50% off up to four ferry tickets to select Boston Harbor Islands. Ferries to Georges and Spectacle Islands are boarded at Long Wharf North Gate 5 in Downtown Boston. Ferries to Peddocks Island are boarded from Hingham. The Pass can be used for: Georges Island May

coupon.source_phrase_block: This pass offers 50% off up to four ferry tickets to select Boston Harbor Islands. Ferries to Georges and Spectacle Islands are boarded at Long Wharf North Gate 5 in Downtown Boston. Ferries to Peddocks Island are boarded from Hingham. The Pass can be used for: Georges Island May 1 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays June 16 - September 1: every day Spectacle Island July 15 - September 1: every day September 4 - 21: Thursdays through Sundays September 26 - October 13: Fridays through Sundays Peddocks Island from Hingham June 15 - September 7: every day BUT Tuesdays September 10 - October 12: Fridays through Sundays
